sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50864" key="i(ppoforbe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱπποφορβ-έω</orth>,= <sense id="n50864.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">keep horses</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4093.tlg001:2l" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2l</biblScope> </bibl>xxxv.</sense> </entryFree>
